g.text: The pod with 3 containers shares a single IP
address. The Gluetun container causes the
pod to be fully connected to the VPN.
for qbitTorrent so downloads can make it
This gluetun configmap has a firewall configured
This allows connectivity from within the cluster to
No need to setup port 8888 or others already
Uptime Kuma is set up to monitor and check the IP address
http proxy is not yet used, but could be
very helpful if i want to filter other services
